title: World War II Timeline
text: World War II began in {{blank-1}} when Germany invaded {{blank-2}}. The United States entered the war after the attack on {{blank-3}} in 1941. The Allied invasion of {{blank-4}} on D-Day was a turning point in the war. The war in Europe ended with Germany's surrender in {{blank-5}}. The war in the Pacific ended after the {{blank-6}} bombings.
